title: Logistics Shipping Documents Automation - Convert Bills of Lading, Customs Forms & Tracking Documents to Excel
metaTitle: Logistics Shipping Documents Automation | Convert to Excel
metaDescription: Automate processing of bills of lading, customs forms, and tracking documents into Excel spreadsheets. OCR and AI extraction for logistics workflows.
h1: Automate Logistics Shipping Documents Processing with AI-Powered Excel Conversion

hero.headline: Transform Logistics Shipping Documents into Structured Data Automatically
hero.subheadline: Convert bills of lading, customs forms, delivery receipts, and tracking documents from PDFs and images into organized Excel spreadsheets using AI extraction

summary: Logistics shipping documents automation streamlines the processing of critical shipping paperwork by converting PDFs and scanned documents into structured Excel data. This eliminates manual data entry for bills of lading, customs declarations, delivery confirmations, and tracking documents, enabling faster processing and reducing errors in logistics management systems.
whoItsFor: Freight forwarders managing multiple shipments daily
Third-party logistics providers handling client shipments
whenThisIsRelevant: Processing hundreds of bills of lading weekly for system entry
Converting scanned customs forms from multiple countries
Extracting tracking data from carrier delivery confirmations
supportedInputs: Digital PDF bills of lading from carriers
JPEG/PNG photos of delivery receipts and tracking documents
expectedOutputs: Excel spreadsheets with shipment details, weights, and destinations
CSV files with customs codes, values, and classification data
commonChallenges: Manual entry of shipment data from PDFs takes hours per batch
Scanned customs forms from different countries have varying layouts
Tracking multiple shipments across carriers requires constant document checking
Converting carrier documents into management system formats is error-prone
howItWorksSteps: Upload your shipping PDFs, scanned customs forms, or document images to the platform
AI extracts key fields like shipment numbers, weights, destinations, and customs codes
Review the extracted data and customize field mapping for your specific document types
Download structured Excel or CSV files ready for import into your logistics management system
whyPdfExcelAiFits: OCR technology reads scanned documents and photos from mobile devices
Custom field extraction adapts to different carrier and customs form layouts
Batch processing handles multiple documents simultaneously for efficiency
99%+ accuracy on clear shipping documents reduces manual verification time
limitations: Accuracy depends on document scan quality - blurry or low-resolution images may need manual review
Heavily damaged or water-stained shipping documents may have missing field data
Handwritten notes on bills of lading have limited recognition compared to printed text

faq.question: Can this process bills of lading from different shipping carriers?
faq.answer: Yes, the AI adapts to various carrier formats including Maersk, MSC, and CMA CGM bills of lading, though custom field mapping may be needed for unique layouts.

faq.question: Does it work with scanned customs forms from different countries?
faq.answer: Yes, it processes scanned customs declarations, though accuracy varies by document quality and you may need to customize field extraction for specific country formats.

faq.question: How does it handle multi-page shipping documents?
faq.answer: The system processes multi-page PDFs and extracts data across pages, though complex nested tables may require manual review for accuracy.

faq.question: Can I process photos of shipping documents taken with a phone?
faq.answer: Yes, it accepts JPEG and PNG images including phone photos, but document quality affects extraction accuracy - ensure good lighting and clear text.

trustSignals: Files encrypted and automatically deleted after processing
99%+ accuracy rate on clear, well-formatted shipping documents
Supports major document formats including PDF, JPEG, and PNG
Free trial available with pay-as-you-go pricing structure
exampleUseCases: Freight forwarder converts 200 weekly bills of lading into Excel for client reporting
Customs broker processes scanned import declarations into structured data for government filing
Logistics company extracts tracking numbers and delivery dates from carrier confirmations
Shipping agent converts multi-carrier documents into standardized format for management system import
